message:
fix: leaderboard social column shimmer + affiliate CTA visibility (#1501)

Add pulse skeleton animation in the Social column while affiliate data
loads instead of showing a static dash. Move the affiliate program CTA
from the bottom of the page (easily missed) to a collapsible banner
between the search bar and leaderboard table where it gets seen.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -170,7 +170,12 @@ function BreakdownPills({ breakdown }: { breakdown: LeaderboardBreakdown }) { // ── Social/affiliate badge ──────────────────────────────────────────── -function SocialBadge({ data }: { data: AffiliateData | undefined }) { +function SocialBadge({ data, loading }: { data: AffiliateData | undefined; loading: boolean }) { + if (loading) { + return ( + + ); + } if (!data || data.clicks === 0) { return ( @@ -230,6 +235,8 @@ export default function LeaderboardPage() { const [search, setSearch] = useState(""); const [countdown, setCountdown] = useState(""); const [affiliateData, setAffiliateData] = useState>({}); + const [affiliateLoading, setAffiliateLoading] = useState(true); + const [affiliateBannerOpen, setAffiliateBannerOpen] = useState(false); const fetchLeaderboard = useCallback(() => { fetch(LEADERBOARD_DATA_PATH) @@ -284,13 +291,16 @@ export default function LeaderboardPage() { signal: AbortSignal.timeout(AFFILIATE_FETCH_TIMEOUT_MS), }) .then((res) => (res.ok ? res.json() : {})) - .then((json: Record) => setAffiliateData(json)); + .then((json: Record) => { + setAffiliateData(json); + setAffiliateLoading(false); + }); let retryHandle: ReturnType | undefined; fetchAffiliates().catch(() => { retryHandle = setTimeout(() => { fetchAffiliates().catch(() => { - // Both attempts failed — affiliate data is optional; leave empty. + setAffiliateLoading(false); }); }, AFFILIATE_RETRY_DELAY_MS); }); @@ -387,6 +397,75 @@ export default function LeaderboardPage() { /> + {/* Affiliate banner — compact, collapsible, above the table */} + {!isLoading && !error && filteredEntries.length > 0 && ( +
+ + {affiliateBannerOpen && ( +
+

+ Share any KubeStellar URL with your personal UTM tag and get credited on the leaderboard. + Open to anyone with a GitHub account. +

+
+ https://console.kubestellar.io + ?utm_source=social&utm_medium= + linkedin + &utm_campaign=contributor_affiliate&utm_term= + your-github-handle +
+
+ utm_term = your GitHub handle, lowercase + utm_medium = twitter, linkedin, blog, youtube, devto, etc. +
+
+ + Why is my Social count not updating? + +
    +
  • + Google Analytics attribution lag: The + utm_campaign / + utm_term dimensions take + 24–48 hours to finalize after a click. +
    • +
  • + Chat apps strip UTM tags: WhatsApp, Discord, Messenger strip + ?utm_* query strings from link previews. Prefer plain-text shares via email, SMS, GitHub comments, or blog posts. +
    • +
  • + Sessions, not page views: Multiple clicks within 30 minutes count as one session. Share to more people, not the same people. +
    • +
  • + Legacy intern-0X links keep working, but new shares should use + utm_term=your-github-handle. +
    • +
+
+
+ )} +
+ )} + {/* Loading state */} {isLoading && (

{/* Breakdown */} @@ -535,61 +614,6 @@ export default function LeaderboardPage() {
)} - {/* Affiliate program CTA */} - {!isLoading && !error && filteredEntries.length > 0 && ( -
-

- - Earn Social Clicks with Your Affiliate Link -

-

- Share any KubeStellar URL with your personal UTM tag and get credited on the leaderboard. - Open to anyone with a GitHub account. -

-
- https://console.kubestellar.io - ?utm_source=social&utm_medium= - linkedin - &utm_campaign=contributor_affiliate&utm_term= - your-github-handle -
-
- utm_term = your GitHub handle, lowercase - utm_medium = twitter, linkedin, blog, youtube, devto, etc. -
- - {/* Why counts may look "stuck" — reduce support churn */} -
- - Why is my Social count not updating? - -
    -
  • - Google Analytics attribution lag: The - utm_campaign / - utm_term dimensions take - 24–48 hours to finalize after a click. - Same-day shares typically appear here the next day. -
    • -
  • - Chat apps strip UTM tags: WhatsApp, Discord, Messenger, and some LinkedIn preview renderers strip the - ?utm_*=… query string when generating link previews. Recipients who click the previewed - (un-tagged) link land as direct / (not set) traffic and cannot be credited back to you. Prefer plain-text shares via email, SMS, GitHub comments, or blog posts where the query string is preserved. -
    • -
  • - Sessions, not page views: One recipient clicking your link multiple times within a 30-minute window counts as a single session. To grow the count, share to - more people, not the same people more often. -
    • -
  • - Legacy intern-0X links keep working, but new shares should use - utm_term=your-github-handle so credits roll up under your GitHub identity rather than a numbered slot. -
    • -
-
-
- )} {/* Build hash */}
